name: Shinhan K200 USD Futures BuySel
summary: Shinhan K200 USD Futures BuySel is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) or fund offered by Shinhan Investment Corporation that likely provides exposure to the KOSPI 200 index by utilizing USD-denominated futures contracts with a buy-sell strategy. It aims to generate returns based on the performance of the KOSPI 200 futures while managing currency risk.
